<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Followup</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/health_followup" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Followup">
					<followup_date />
					<followup_status />
					<outcome_notes />
					<close_case />
				</data>
			</instance>
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/followup_date" nodeset="/data/followup_date" type="xsd:date" required="true()" calculate="today()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/followup_status" nodeset="/data/followup_status" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/outcome_notes" nodeset="/data/outcome_notes" type="xsd:string" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/close_case" nodeset="/data/close_case" vellum:calculate="if(#form/followup_status = 'completed' or #form/followup_status = 'cancelled', 'true', 'false')" calculate="if(/data/followup_status = 'completed' or /data/followup_status = 'cancelled', 'true', 'false')" />
			<itext>
				<translation lang="en" default="">
					<text id="followup_date-label">
						<value>Follow-up Date</value>
					</text>
					<text id="followup_status-label">
						<value>Follow-up Status</value>
					</text>
					<text id="followup_status-completed-label">
						<value>Completed</value>
					</text>
					<text id="followup_status-ongoing-label">
						<value>Ongoing</value>
					</text>
					<text id="followup_status-cancelled-label">
						<value>Cancelled</value>
					</text>
					<text id="followup_status-rescheduled-label">
						<value>Rescheduled</value>
					</text>
					<text id="outcome_notes-label">
						<value>What happened since last visit?</value>
					</text>
				</translation>
			</itext>
		</model>
	</h:head>
	<h:body>
		<input vellum:ref="#form/followup_date" ref="/data/followup_date">
			<label ref="jr:itext('followup_date-label')">Follow-up Date</label>
		</input>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/followup_status" ref="/data/followup_status">
			<label ref="jr:itext('followup_status-label')" />
			<item>
				<label ref="jr:itext('followup_status-completed-label')" />
				<value>completed</value>
			</item>
			<item>
				<label ref="jr:itext('followup_status-ongoing-label')" />
				<value>ongoing</value>
			</item>
			<item>
				<label ref="jr:itext('followup_status-cancelled-label')" />
				<value>cancelled</value>
			</item>
			<item>
				<label ref="jr:itext('followup_status-rescheduled-label')" />
				<value>rescheduled</value>
			</item>
		</select1>
		<input vellum:ref="#form/outcome_notes" ref="/data/outcome_notes">
			<label ref="jr:itext('outcome_notes-label')">What happened since last visit?</label>
			<hint>Enter details regarding the outcome or observations.</hint>
		</input>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Health Visit Form</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/health_visit" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Health Visit Form">
					<visit_date />
					<activity_type />
					<activity_description />
					<num_beneficiaries_male />
					<num_beneficiaries_female />
					<num_beneficiaries_total />
					<num_children_under5 />
					<health_topic />
					<referrals_made />
					<supplies_distributed />
					<gps_location />
					<photo_evidence />
					<notes />
					<create_health_visit vellum:case_type="'health_visit'" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
						<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
							<create>
								<case_type />
								<case_name />
								<owner_id />
							</create>
							<update>
								<visit_date />
								<activity_type />
								<activity_description />
								<male_served />
								<female_served />
								<total_served />
								<children_under5 />
								<topic />
								<referral_count />
								<supplies />
								<location />
							</update>
							<index>
								<parent case_type="beneficiary" relationship="child" />
							</index>
						</case>
					</create_health_visit>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/visit_date" nodeset="/data/visit_date" type="xsd:date" constraint=". <= today() and . >= (today() - 30)" jr:constraintMsg="Date must not be in future and within last 30 days" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/activity_type" nodeset="/data/activity_type" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/activity_description" nodeset="/data/activity_description" type="xsd:string" constraint="string-length(.) <= 500" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/num_beneficiaries_male" nodeset="/data/num_beneficiaries_male" type="xsd:int" constraint=". >= 0" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/num_beneficiaries_female" nodeset="/data/num_beneficiaries_female" type="xsd:int" constraint=". >= 0" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/num_beneficiaries_total" nodeset="/data/num_beneficiaries_total" vellum:calculate="#form/num_beneficiaries_male + #form/num_beneficiaries_female" calculate="/data/num_beneficiaries_male + /data/num_beneficiaries_female" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/num_children_under5" nodeset="/data/num_children_under5" type="xsd:int" vellum:relevant="#form/activity_type = 'vaccination' or #form/activity_type = 'maternal_care'" relevant="/data/activity_type = 'vaccination' or /data/activity_type = 'maternal_care'" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/health_topic" nodeset="/data/health_topic" vellum:relevant="#form/activity_type = 'health_education'" relevant="/data/activity_type = 'health_education'" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/referrals_made" nodeset="/data/referrals_made" type="xsd:int" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/supplies_distributed" nodeset="/data/supplies_distributed" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/gps_location" nodeset="/data/gps_location" type="geopoint" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/photo_evidence" nodeset="/data/photo_evidence" type="binary" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/notes" nodeset="/data/notes" type="xsd:string" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/create/case_type" calculate="'health_visit'" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/create/case_name" vellum:calculate="#form/visit_date" calculate="/data/visit_date" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/create/owner_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/update/visit_date" vellum:calculate="#form/visit_date" calculate="/data/visit_date" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/update/activity_type" vellum:calculate="#form/activity_type" calculate="/data/activity_type" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/update/activity_description" vellum:calculate="#form/activity_description" calculate="/data/activity_description" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/update/male_served" vellum:calculate="#form/num_beneficiaries_male" calculate="/data/num_beneficiaries_male" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/update/female_served" vellum:calculate="#form/num_beneficiaries_female" calculate="/data/num_beneficiaries_female" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/update/total_served" vellum:calculate="#form/num_beneficiaries_total" calculate="/data/num_beneficiaries_total" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/update/children_under5" vellum:calculate="#form/num_children_under5" calculate="/data/num_children_under5" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/update/topic" vellum:calculate="#form/health_topic" calculate="/data/health_topic" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/update/referral_count" vellum:calculate="#form/referrals_made" calculate="/data/referrals_made" />

			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/update/location" vellum:calculate="#form/gps_location" calculate="/data/gps_location" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/index/parent" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/@date_modified" calculate="/data/meta/timeEnd" type="xsd:dateTime" />
			<bind nodeset="/data/create_health_visit/case/@user_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/create_health_visit/case/@case_id" value="uuid()" />
			<itext>

					<text id="visit_date-label">

        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('community_details/primary_livelihoods-trading-label')"/>

        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('community_details/primary_livelihoods-mining-label')"/>
          <value>mining</value>
        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('community_details/primary_livelihoods-livestock-label')"/>
          <value>livestock</value>
        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('community_details/primary_livelihoods-other-label')"/>

        </item>
      </select>
      <select1 vellum:ref="#form/community_details/has_health_facility" ref="/data/community_details/has_health_facility">
        <label ref="jr:itext('community_details/has_health_facility-label')"/>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('community_details/has_health_facility-yes-label')"/>
          <value>yes</value>
        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('community_details/has_health_facility-no-label')"/>

        </item>
      </select1>
      <select1 vellum:ref="#form/community_details/has_school" ref="/data/community_details/has_school">

          <value>yes</value>
        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('community_details/has_school-no-label')"/>
          <value>no</value>
        </item>
      </select1>
      <select1 vellum:ref="#form/community_details/has_clean_water" ref="/data/community_details/has_clean_water">
        <label ref="jr:itext('community_details/has_clean_water-label')"/>

          <value>yes</value>
        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('community_details/has_clean_water-no-label')"/>
          <value>no</value>
        </item>
      </select1>
    </group>
    <group vellum:ref="#form/community_contact" ref="/data/community_contact" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('community_contact-label')"/>
      <input vellum:ref="#form/community_contact/community_leader_name" ref="/data/community_contact/community_leader_name">
        <label ref="jr:itext('community_contact/community_leader_name-label')"/>
      </input>
      <input vellum:ref="#form/community_contact/community_leader_phone" ref="/data/community_contact/community_leader_phone">

      </input>
      <upload mediatype="image/*" jr:imageDimensionScaledMax="250px" vellum:ref="#form/community_contact/photo_of_the_community_landmark" ref="/data/community_contact/photo_of_the_community_landmark">
        <label ref="jr:itext('community_contact/photo_of_the_community_landmark-label')"/>
      </upload>
    </group>
  </h:body>
</h:html>
